zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel於1283年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓時，她的父親Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch41歲，母親Llian verch Cynhaethwy48歲。她與Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和12個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年在威爾士格拉莫爾根享年97歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel于1283年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓时，她的父亲Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch41岁，母亲Llian verch Cynhaethwy48岁。她与Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和12个女儿的父母。她去世于1380年在威尔士格拉莫爾根享年97岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: Foel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, composed of two different Hebrew elements, Yah(weh) and El, both of which mean ‘God’ the implication of the name is that the Hebrew God, Yahweh, is the only true god. This is a common name in the Bible, being borne by, among others, one of King David's ‘mighty men’ (1 Chronicles 11:38), and a minor prophet who lived in the 8th century bc . The name has been perennially popular as a Jewish name; it was also taken up by the Puritans and other Christian fundamentalists. The name has long been in regular use in North America but was uncommon in Britain until the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American singer and entertainer Joel Grey ( b. 1932 ), the West Indian cricketer Joel Garner ( b. 1952 ), and the American film director Joel Coen ( b. 1954 ). The French form Joël is also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel was born in 1283, in Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch, was 41 and her mother, Llian verch Cynhaethwy, was 48. She married Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 12 daughters. She died in 1380, in Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 97, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel est née en 1283, à Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Llian verch Cynhaethwy, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 12 filles. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel 1283 in Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch 41 und ihre Mutter Llian verch Cynhaethwy 48. Sie hat Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel è nata il nel 1283 nel Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Llian verch Cynhaethwy, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 12 figlie. Morì nel 1380, nel Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Rhys Foelが1283年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンカドクストンで生まれた時，父Rhys Foel ap Rhys Gochは41歳，母Llian verch Cynhaethwyは48歳であった。Hopkin ap Hywel Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年にウェールズグラモーガンで97歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel(이)가 1283년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 카도스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Llian verch Cynhaethwy(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 웨일스 글램르건에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel nasceu em 1283, em Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Llian verch Cynhaethwy, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 12 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Glamorgan, Gales, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel родилась в 1283 г. в местности кадокстон, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Llian verch Cynhaethwy, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel nació en 1283, en Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Llian verch Cynhaethwy, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió en 1380, en Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultada en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
